findings.message: Possible SQL injection: an f-string is being passed directly into a SQL execute() call. Use parameterized queries instead.
findings.fix: Use parameterized queries instead of string formatting.
findings.cve_detail: SQL injection vulnerability in read.php3 and other scripts in Phorum 3.0.7 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries via the sSQL parameter.

order_management.py.original: Possible SQL injection: an f-string is being passed directly into a SQL execute() call. Use parameterized queries instead.
order_management.py.fixed_code: cursor.execute("UPDATE customers SET email=%s WHERE id=%s", (email, customer_id))
order_management.py.explanation: I replaced the f-string with a parameterized query to prevent SQL injection by passing the variables as a tuple to the execute method.
